name: Altered Appearance
description: Anything from common plastic surgery to making the patient unrecognizable, including age changes.

name: Biometric Reader
description: Enables proximity and touch personal identification.

name: Ocular Implant
description: Advantage to OBSERVATION in darkness, KIA uplink.

name: Cochlear Implants
description: Augments natural hearing capabilities. Advantage to OBSERVATION when listening.

name: Medical Implant
description: Removes the permanent effect of a critical injury.

name: Prosthetic Arm
description: Stronger bones and muscles. Advantage to FORCE when using arm strength, base Damage 2 for unarmed attacks.

name: Prosthetic Leg
description: Stronger bones and muscles. Advantage to MOBILITY when using running or jumping.

name: Synaptic Implants
description: Augments synaptic reflexes from spinal cord. Draw an extra initiative card at the start of combat and choose which to use.
